content:
📢 Deadline Extended for Abstract Submissions!

Due to numerous requests, we have decided to extend the deadline for abstract submissions by two weeks.

🗓️ New submission deadline: July 15

If you haven't had the chance to submit your abstract yet, this is a great opportunity to finalize your work. We look forward to receiving your exciting contributions!
comment: Extending submission deadlines often helps authors, but it can compress review cycles and increase reviewer load, which may affect consistency in evaluation across batches.
